# Define normalization utilities for Arabic text
import re, unicodedata
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
tatweel_re = re.compile(r"[\u0640]")
punct_re = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = str(s)
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    s = tatweel_re.sub("", s)
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ٱ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ؤ","و")
    # Keep ta marbuta as ha? Often useful; but we avoid losing too much
    s = s.replace("ة","ه")
    # Remove punctuation
    s = punct_re.sub(" ", s)
    # Collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

# Prepare hadith text list
hadith_texts = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_data):
    # Prefer Matn if present; else hadithTxt
    text = rec.get("Matn") or rec.get("hadithTxt") or ""
    hadith_texts.append((i, rec, text, normalize_ar(text)))

# Prepare Quran texts
quran_texts = []
for i, rec in enumerate(quran_data):
    text = rec.get("ayah_text") or ""
    quran_texts.append((i, rec, text, normalize_ar(text)))

full_span = "لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"
snippet = "لا عملا يع... إلا ضيعته"
full_norm = normalize_ar(full_span)
print("Full normalized span:", full_norm)

# Direct substring search in hadiths
hits_sub = [(i, rec, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if full_norm in norm]
len(hits_sub), hits_sub[:3]

# Search for key subphrases in hadiths
phrases = ["شاغلا عن الله", "يعمله العبد", "ضيعته", "لا عملا", "إلا ضيعته", "يعمله"]
for phrase in phrases:
    norm_p = normalize_ar(phrase)
    hits = [(i, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if norm_p in norm]
    print(phrase, "hits:", len(hits))
    for i, text in hits[:5]:
        print("-", text[:120].replace("\n"," "))
    print("---")

# Search for hadiths with "لا يقبل الله" and related phrases
queries = [
    "لا يقبل الله من العمل إلا",
    "إن الله لا يقبل من العمل إلا",
    "لا يقبل الله عملا",
    "إن الله لا يقبل إلا",
    "لا يقبل الله إلا",
    "خالصا",
    "ابتغي به وجهه",
    "لا يقبل الله من أحد إلا"
]
for q in queries:
    qn = normalize_ar(q)
    hits = [(i, rec, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if qn in norm]
    print(q, "hits:", len(hits))
    for i, rec, text in hits[:5]:
        print("-", text[:200].replace("\n"," "))
    print("---")

# Retrieve the hadith containing the phrase "إن الله لا يقبل من العمل إلا" to inspect full text
target_norm = normalize_ar("إن الله لا يقبل من العمل إلا")
candidates = [(i, rec, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if target_norm in norm]
len(candidates), candidates[0][2] if candidates else None

# Compute similarity between the provided full span and candidate hadith using normalized text and LCS/SequenceMatcher
full_span = "لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"
candidate = 'جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ : أَرَأَيْتَ رَجُلًا غَزَا يَلْتَمِسُ الْأَجْرَ وَالذِّكْرَ مَا لَهُ ؟ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ : لَا شَيْءَ لَهُ . فَأَعَادَهَا ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ ، يَقُولُ لَهُ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ : لَا شَيْءَ لَهُ . ثُمَّ قَالَ : إِنَّ اللهَ لَا يَقْبَلُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ إِلَّا مَا كَانَ لَهُ خَالِصًا ، وَابْتُغِيَ بِهِ وَجْهُهُ . '
def norm(s): 
    return normalize_ar(s)
full_n = norm(full_span)
cand_n = norm(candidate)
ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, full_n, cand_n).ratio()
full_n, cand_n[:120], ratio

# Search for potential similar patterns
terms = ["شاغلا", "شغل", "شاغل", "عمل", "عملا", "العبد", "ضيعته", "لا عمل"]
for t in terms:
    norm_t = normalize_ar(t)
    hits = [(i, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if norm_t in norm]
    print(t, "hits:", len(hits))
    for i, text in hits[:3]:
        print("-", text[:150].replace("\n"," "))
    print("---")

# Search for "أنا أغنى الشركاء عن الشرك" variant
cands = [(i, rec, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if "انا اغنى الشركاء عن الشرك" in norm]
len(cands), cands[0][2] if cands else None

# Search for "إنما الأعمال بالنيات"
hits = [(i, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if "انما الاعمال بالنيات" in norm]
len(hits), hits[0][1] if hits else None

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
full_span = "لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"
cand = 'إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى ، فَمَنْ كَانَتْ هِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى دُنْيَا يُصِيبُهَا ، أَوْ إِلَى امْرَأَةٍ يَنْكِحُهَا ، فَهِجْرَتُهُ إِلَى مَا هَاجَرَ إِلَيْهِ '
SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(full_span), normalize_ar(cand)).ratio()

cand = "الْمُؤْمِنُ مِرْآةُ الْمُؤْمِنِ ، وَالْمُؤْمِنُ أَخُو الْمُؤْمِنِ ، يَكُفُّ عَلَيْهِ ضَيْعَتَهُ وَيَحُوطُهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِ . "
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar("لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"), normalize_ar(cand)).ratio()

# Search in Quran for related words to be thorough
for q in ["شاغلا", "شغل", "ضيع", "ضيعته", "عمل", "يعمله", "العبد"]:
    hits = [(i, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in quran_texts if normalize_ar(q) in norm]
    print(q, "hits:", len(hits))
    for i, text in hits[:3]:
        print("-", text)
    print("---")

# Compute similarity of all hadith matn texts with the full span; report top 10
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)).ratio()

full_span = "لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"
full_n = normalize_ar(full_span)

top = []
for i, rec, text, norm in hadith_texts:
    r = sim_ratio(full_span, text)
    top.append((r, i, text))

top_sorted = sorted(top, reverse=True)[:10]
[(round(r,3), text[:150].replace("\n"," ")) for r, i, text in top_sorted]

# Search for phrases that look grammatically similar
for p in ["لا عمل لمن", "لا يقبل الله عملا", "لا يقبل عملا", "لا يقبل الله عمل", "لا يقبل من العمل إلا ما كان له خالصا", "ما كان لله خالصا", "لله خالصا"]:
    hits = [(i, text) for (i, rec, text, norm) in hadith_texts if normalize_ar(p) in norm]
    print(p, "hits:", len(hits))
    for i, text in hits[:5]:
        print("-", text[:200])
    print("---")

# Compute similarity of all Quran ayat with the full span to confirm no close match
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)).ratio()

full_span = "لا عملا يعمله العبد شاغلا عن الله إلا ضيعته"
top_q = []
for i, rec, text, norm in quran_texts:
    r = sim_ratio(full_span, text)
    top_q.append((r, i, text))
top_q_sorted = sorted(top_q, reverse=True)[:10]
[(round(r,3), text) for r, i, text in top_q_sorted]
